note: Upgrades are paid in SUI again, and the fee now accumulates in the Treasury object's balance for the coordinator to sweep with claim_treasury (CoordinatorCap-gated). The test_usdc module stays published: tUSDC is the in-app currency users hold to fund contests and challenge duels, minted by the coordinator's TreasuryCap. SUI upgrade ladder 0.1/0.3/0.8/1.5. Avow package (0x4f3e...a3ee) reused unchanged.

supersedes.reason: That build charged upgrades in TestUSDC. Reverted: SUI is the upgrade currency; tUSDC is repurposed as the in-app currency, and upgrade fees now pool in the Treasury for claiming.
